title: Sqlitelogictest: Aggregation query with distinct clause produces duplicated rows
poc: CREATE TABLE tab0(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER);
SELECT DISTINCT + + col1, col1 FROM tab0 AS cor0 GROUP BY col0, col1 HAVING NOT NULL IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Aggregation query with distinct clause produces duplicates
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), score FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT DISTINCT score, name FROM test_table WHERE score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY score;
CREATE TABLE another_table(ref_id INTEGER, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
INSERT INTO another_table VALUES(1, 'Top Performer'), (2, 'Good Performer'), (1, 'Top Performer');
